title: When is Uzbekistan World Cup squad announcement? Date & time revealed
original_text:
When is Uzbekistan World Cup squad announcement? Date & time revealed
The White Wolves will make their FIFA World Cup debut this summer.
Last June, Uzbekistan qualified for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The Uzbekistan Football Association (UFA) then sought a manager with more international experience despite the success of the country in Central Asia.
After defeating more seasoned teams like Qatar and the United Arab Emirates during qualification, the Uzbek squad, led by Fabio Cannavaro and featuring players like Abdukodir Khusanov and Eldor Shomurodov, will enter the tournament.
As anticipation grows for the nation’s first World Cup, Cannavaro hopes supporters have reasonable expectations because he is aware of how challenging the competition is.
Before facing Cristiano Ronaldo’s Portugal, the Democratic Republic of the Congo, and Colombia in group play, Uzbekistan will complete its World Cup training with friendlies against Canada and the Netherlands.
fiAlso read: When is USMNT (USA) World Cup squad announcement? Date & time revealed
When will Uzbekistan announce their final World Cup squad?
Following the FIFA deadline of June 1 for all participating nations to submit their final rosters, Uzbekistan’s final 26-man World Cup team will be formally revealed on June 2, 2026.
The 40-person provisional training group that head coach Fabio Cannavaro is presently working with in Tashkent will be reduced to the final roster prior to the FIFA World Cup 2026 announcement.
A larger team has been assembled for a three-week training camp in Tashkent from May 6–26 as Uzbekistan’s FIFA World Cup 2026 preparations pick up steam.
For the camp at the National Football Centre, head coach Fabio Cannavaro has selected 40 players. The team will play a series of friendly games against domestic Super League teams behind closed doors.
Milliy terma jamoamiz 6–26-may kunlari Toshkentda yig‘in o‘tkazadi. Yig‘in doirasida Superliga klublariga qarshi yopiq nazorat uchrashuvlari rejalashtirilgan. Bosh murabbiy Fabio Cannavaro jalb qilgan kengaytirilgan tarkib bilan tanishing.

— O‘zbekiston FA (@UzbekistanFA) May 5, 2026
When was the last time Uzbekistan played at the World Cup?
As of now, 2026 will be their first World Cup appearance.
Who is their head coach?
Former Italian player and World Cup winner, Fabio Cannavaro.
In which World Cup group are they in?
They are in group K.
